title: Expand or explicitly narrow obstacle/sensor parity
description: Bring the obstacle/sensor stack closer to DiffAero where feasible, and explicitly de-scope what cannot be completed in this branch.
acceptance: Obstacle/sensor support matrix is explicit in code and docs
New or updated tests cover any changed obstacle/state/sensor contract
Deferred parity items are named explicitly instead of implied
review_focus: No divergence between sensor implementation and documented task semantics
